creator: ari@ish.com.au
text:
I don't think either javamail or Derby are hard dependencies. Although they are in the default config, a user might just as easily use MySQL as a database backend and not configure mail integration at all. So perhaps they should be considered optional extras that are up to the user to configure. Should this be handled with OPTIONS or with a message after installation?

Ari Maniatis
